channel.title: brydge on Neueste Angebote

item.title: Brydge Pro 11.0 Wireless German QWERTZ Keyboard Compatible with iPad Pro 11-inch 1st Gen 2018 Bluetooth Wireless Keyboard with Backlit Keys
item.description: Es gibt ein Brydge Pro 11.0 Wireless German QWERTZ Keyboard Compatible with iPad Pro 11-inch 1st Gen 2018 Bluetooth Wireless Keyboard with Backlit Keys hier: ℹ️: QUALITY DESIGN | Brydge Pro keyboards blur the line between tablet and laptop, transforming your iPad into a device you can use anywhere, anytime. Each keyboard is beautifully engineered from machined aluminum to match the design, quality and color of the iPad. Weighing 18.2 ounces, this iPad Pro keyboard gives you the stability you need to type comfortably.
